newsSinceJun6: No company-specific news since June 6. Today's +5.59% move (to CNY 500.5, YTD +112%) is a continuation of the China memory-sector melt-up: GigaDevice was the highest-turnover A-share on June 4 (+7%), Morgan Stanley sharply raised its target on May 29 citing a 'legacy memory super-cycle', and Q1 2026 results (revenue +120%, net income +510%) plus NOR/niche-DRAM price hikes through 2026 are all pre-June-6, well-disseminated information. Today's move looks flow/momentum-driven within a known fundamental upcycle, not new evidence.

sources.label: Sina Finance (Jun 4): memory stocks rally, GigaDevice tops A-share turnover, price-hike trend seen lasting all year
Sina Finance (May 29): Morgan Stanley calls legacy memory super-cycle, big GigaDevice target hike
CLS.cn: AI compute demand drives memory-chip stocks, GigaDevice H-shares +8%
DigiTimes (May 21): GigaDevice sees niche DRAM and NAND prices rising through 2026

verdicts.rankRationale: On a crowding-sensitive CPO alpha page, another +5.6% day on top of +112% YTD with zero new fundamental evidence since June 6 further erodes residual alpha; the name is now the most-traded, most-upgraded face of the China memory trade and has little direct optical-interconnect exposure anyway.
verdicts.bull: China's only design house spanning NOR, SLC NAND and specialty DRAM in a memory upcycle with contract prices rising through 2026; Q1 net income +510% shows the pricing leverage is real, and localization tailwinds persist.
verdicts.neutral: Fundamentals are genuinely strong but fully broadcast: sell-side targets raised, record A-share turnover, and price-hike expectations already embedded in a 112% YTD double; thesis intact, alpha mostly harvested.
verdicts.bear: A consensus-owned momentum name on a niche-memory cycle that can roll over fast; inventory revaluation gains reverse on any price flattening, and the stock has no real claim on the CPO/optical bottleneck this page is built around.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Continued NOR/niche-DRAM/SLC NAND contract price hikes plus Q2 2026 earnings confirming the super-cycle run-rate.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Memory price momentum stalling or a China retail-flow unwind compressing a crowded, rerated multiple.
